title: Bernard Roizman, pioneering University of Chicago virologist, 1929–2026
summary_en: Roizman reshaped the field of virology through his work on the herpes simplex virus, laying the groundwork for efforts to develop vaccines and other therapies.
title_cn: 芝加哥大学先驱病毒学家伯纳德·罗伊兹曼逝世 享年96岁

title: UChicago physicist Clay Córdova awarded 2026 New Horizons Prize in Physics
summary_en: University of Chicago physicist Clay Córdova has been named a recipient of the 2026 New Horizons in Physics Prize for his work in quantum field theory.
